titleStmt.title: SII 15.133: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 133. (B.K. No. 26 of 1930-31.) MANAGŌḶI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a broken slab lying in the Hanumān temple.

The record is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Viḷambi, Āshāḍha śu. 11, Sunday, Dakshiṇāyana-samkramaṇa, corresponding to 1178 A.D., June 27. The weekday, however, was Tuesday. This date is quoted from the published text.

This is the earlier unpublished portion of the inscription, the later portion of which is published in the Epigraphia Indica, Vol. V, pp. 26 ff. It states that the king was ruling from his nelevīḍu at Navile and mentions his subordinate Brahmadēvadaṇḍādhīśa whose genealogy is given. It also praises the Mahājanas of Maṇimga vaḷḷi. The record is considerably damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
puruśōttamūya namaḥ jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇō¨rvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitā¨rṇnavaṁ dakṣi ṇōṁnna
ta daṁṣṭrāgra viśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapu . © svasti samastabhuvanāsra
pṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēsvaraṁ kāḷāṁjara puravarādhīsvaraṁ
bhadhvajaṁ ḍamarugatū¨ryyani¨rgghōśaṇaṁ kaḷacu¨ryyakuḷakamaḻa mā
mānakanakācaḷaṁ subhaṭarādityaṁ kaligaḷaṁkusaṁ gajabhūmi pā
raṁ pratāpalaṁkēśvaraṁ paranārīsahōdaraṁ sanivārasiddhi giri du¨rggamalla
nissaṁkamalla nāmādi samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrimatu ka
saṁkamadēvarasaru vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddi pra
salutta navileya nelavīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinōda
baliyaṁ tanvitakābyasēbyaninanaṁtatyudugha nityō dayōjvaḷanaṁbhōni
ṟe maṁḍaḷa dharō¨rjjita satkaḷākaḷitanīṁdrēbhaṁ
daṁḍādhipakēśavaṁ . Ā kēśavadaṁḍēśana lōkajanastu
brahmadēva daṁḍādhīśaṁ . dha¨rmmara tatvadoḷupirida nivē
janiṁ suramahīruhadiṁ surarāja
¨rmme sāsi¨rmmaḍiyāgi baṇnipudu dhā
prabhuvīśvaradēvanātmalakṣmī
manaṁṇaṁ nelemāḍidanuttarōtta
[. Ātana] tanūjanudghaharītānvaya
mātēṁ prabhu mādirājanū¨rjjita tējaṁ .
driḍhasatyadiṁ guruvina ¨rmmitradiṁdra naṁdananaṁ nava
nananaṁ sobagiṁdaveṁdenisuva lakṣmīdhavaṁ mādhavaṁ . Āga
ccaritaṁ surādriyaṁ migilabhimānaduṁnati ca tu¨rmmukhaniṁda
yeṁdu taṁtamage paṁḍitamaṁḍaḷi mecci biccataṁ pogaḷe maṇniṁgavaḷḷiya mahāja
janaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 15.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
